_meta._comment: This file contains anonymized cron job templates. Before importing, replace all {{PLACEHOLDERS}} with your actual values:

_placeholders.{{CHANNEL_ID}}: Discord channel ID for personal ops
_placeholders.Brain OS Manager: Your main agent's name (e.g., Brain OS Manager, Assistant)
_placeholders.your-main-model: Model ID for main agent tasks (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4)
_placeholders.your-light-model: Cheap model for routine tasks (e.g., haiku, glm-4.7-flash)
_placeholders.External Tool: External project management tool name (e.g., Agora, Linear, or empty)

payload.message: First run `/tmp/brain-os-test/vault/scripts/init-nightly-digest.sh /tmp/brain-os-test/vault <target-date>` so the digest skeleton and run-report directory exist. Then read and follow /tmp/brain-os-test/workspace/article-notes-integration.prompt.md. Use the article-notes-integration skill as the governing protocol. Only fill section `## 02:00 Article Integration`, do not rewrite the whole digest. Target date is yesterday in Asia/Shanghai unless explicitly provided. Process newly added or still-pending article notes only. Update article metadata, relation fields, and lightweight index/graph surfaces only when justified. Emit a no-op report when there is no signal. Success means Brain write + git commit + post-commit sync + Obsidian visible.

First run `/tmp/brain-os-test/vault/scripts/init-nightly-digest.sh /tmp/brain-os-test/vault <target-date>` so the digest skeleton and run-report directory exist. Then run `/tmp/brain-os-test/workspace/scripts/export-conversations-for-nightly.sh 3` to export recent AI conversations into `{{TRANSCRIPT_DIR}}` before mining. Then run `/tmp/brain-os-test/skills/conversation-knowledge-flywheel/scripts/preflight.sh <target-date>` to verify transcript availability and QMD health. Then read and follow /tmp/brain-os-test/workspace/conversation-knowledge-mining.prompt.md. Use the conversation-knowledge-flywheel skill as the governing protocol for the 03:00 conversation stage. Read the existing digest first, then only fill section `## 03:00 Conversation Mining`. Upstream read order is fixed: shared nightly digest -> `03-KNOWLEDGE/99-SYSTEM/03-INTEGRATION-REPORTS/run-reports/YYYY-MM-DD/` -> stable indexes if needed. Do not rely on legacy report paths under `12-REVIEWS/KNOWLEDGEBASE/`. Target date is yesterday in Asia/Shanghai unless explicitly provided. Produce transcript-derived knowledge only when there is real signal, but even no-op / degraded runs must leave both digest and machine report. Success means Brain write + git commit + post-commit sync + Obsidian visible.

First run `/tmp/brain-os-test/vault/scripts/init-nightly-digest.sh /tmp/brain-os-test/vault <target-date>` so the digest skeleton and run-report directory exist. Then read and follow /tmp/brain-os-test/workspace/knowledge-flywheel-amplifier.prompt.md. Use the knowledge-flywheel-amplifier skill as the governing protocol for the 04:00 amplifier stage. Read the existing digest first, then only fill section `## 04:00 Amplifier` and the final summary block. Target date is yesterday in Asia/Shanghai unless explicitly provided. Read outputs from 02:00 and 03:00 if present; if one is missing, continue in degraded mode; if both are missing, emit a no-op report rather than inventing synthesis. Do not auto-run heavy deep research. Success means Brain write + git commit + post-commit sync + Obsidian visible.

jobs.name: knowledge-lint-weekly
jobs.description: 每周一 01:00 独立触发知识库内容级 Lint（作为 02:00 article-notes-integration lint pass 的备用独立入口）

payload.message:
Read and follow the `knowledge-lint` skill at /tmp/brain-os-test/skills/knowledge-lint/SKILL.md.

First step (mandatory): run `/tmp/brain-os-test/vault/scripts/init-nightly-digest.sh /tmp/brain-os-test/vault <target-date>` so the digest skeleton and run-report directory exist. Then only fill section `## 01:00 Knowledge Lint`.

Execute a full knowledge base content lint for ZeYu-AI-Brain:
- Brain root: /tmp/brain-os-test/vault
- Run scripts/knowledge-lint.sh (or perform LLM-based equivalent if script is missing)
- Write machine-facing report to 03-KNOWLEDGE/99-SYSTEM/03-INTEGRATION-REPORTS/run-reports/YYYY-MM-DD/knowledge-lint-YYYY-MM-DD.md
- Update human-facing digest at 03-KNOWLEDGE/01-READING/04-DIGESTS/nightly-digest-YYYY-MM-DD.md under section `## 01:00 Knowledge Lint`
- Commit to Brain git

Digest section should only tell Alex：知识库健康是否正常 / 高优先级问题大概有多少 / 是否需要他关心。

Success = report written + digest updated + committed + Obsidian-visible.

jobs.name: daily-knowledge-graph-canvas-0500
jobs.description: 每天05:00自动生成知识图谱Canvas并发送至知识库文章沉淀频道

payload.message:
每日知识图谱生成任务（05:00）。

步骤1：运行脚本生成今日知识图谱 Canvas：
python3 /tmp/brain-os-test/workspace/scripts/knowledge-graph-canvas.py

步骤2：检查脚本输出（节点数、连线数、RQ匹配情况），若脚本失败记录错误并通知。

步骤3：读取以下目录最近7天新增文件，分析文章之间的跨主题语义关联：
- /tmp/brain-os-test/vault/03-KNOWLEDGE/02-WORKING/01-ARTICLE-NOTES/
- /tmp/brain-os-test/vault/03-KNOWLEDGE/01-READING/01-DOMAINS/

步骤4：对发现的跨主题关联（脚本无法自动识别的语义关联），直接编辑今日canvas文件，在edges数组末尾追加新连线。label格式：'[Agent] 关联说明'，color用'3'（黄色）区分。

步骤5：git add + git commit。
Brain仓库：/tmp/brain-os-test/vault
commit message：auto: knowledge graph YYYY-MM-DD + agent annotations

步骤6：向Discord频道1489421056379846716发送完成通知（2-3行）：
🧠 知识图谱已更新 YYYY-MM-DD | 节点 X | 连线 Y（含 Z 条Agent标注）| RQ XX/YY
